---
title: "Visualizing dynamics of object oriented programs with time context"
author:
  - name: Filip Grznár
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2013-05-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Proceedings - SCCG 2013: 29th Spring Conference on Computer Graphics"
  doi: "10.1145/2508244.2508253"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1145/2508244.2508253"
  isbn: "978-1-4503-2480-9"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1145/2508244.2508253](https://doi.org/10.1145/2508244.2508253)
